summary: Phase 3 UI/UX enhancement testing of UGS HireFlow. Backend regression 73/73 PASS (Phase 1 34 + Phase 2 39, no API changes). Frontend landing page fully verified — all 13+ sections render: hero (Excel strikethrough + HireFlow gradient), animated stats, 5-stage workflow (Registration→Verification→Assignment→Interview→Placement), 8-item feature grid, dashboard showcase, Why Choose Us, 3 testimonials, FAQ accordion (5 items), CTA (Register now / Talk to us). About/Services/Contact pages render with animated hero. Contact form submit shows 'Message received. We'll be in touch shortly' success toast. Login admin@ugs.com/Admin@123 → /app OK. Dashboard shows all 8 KPI counters (60/31/17/1/3/6/10/2) with skeleton→reveal transition. Sidebar navigation works (Candidates, Pipeline, Companies, Job Openings, Batches, Partners, Employees, Reports, Activity Log, Settings) with active-pill layoutId animation and page fade/slide transitions — zero console errors during nav. Global search 'priya' returns popover results. Responsive 375px: hero adapts, mobile-menu-btn shows, hero-register-btn stays visible & tappable. Framer-motion 12.42.2 chunk loads cleanly (no lazy-load failures).

ui_bugs.issue: Nested <a> hydration warning persists (carryover from iteration_2). Only triggers inside authenticated /app layout, not on public landing.

No visible theme-toggle button found on public landing (data-testid/aria-label absent). Users can only toggle theme post-login. If theme switching on landing was intended (per test request), add a visible toggle in public nav.

action_items: (LOW) Fix nested <a> hydration warning in DashboardLayout — outstanding from iteration_2.
(MEDIUM) Add visible theme-toggle on public landing/nav if dark-mode landing preview was intended (currently no toggle available pre-login).
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page is now large (13+ sections in Home.jsx); consider splitting section components (HeroSection, WorkflowSection, FeaturesGrid, TestimonialsSection, FAQSection) into separate files for maintainability.

framer-motion is used heavily on the landing page — ensure prefers-reduced-motion CSS override in index.css actually disables the motion variants (verify runtime by adding a media-query listener), not only CSS keyframe animations.
Consider adding data-testid attributes to individual FAQ items, testimonial cards, and workflow stages for finer test targeting (currently only nav/hero/cta testids exist).
seed_data_creation: None new; existing Phase 1/2 seed unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 is UI-only, no backend behaviour changes. Backend regression 73/73 green (run: pytest backend/tests/ -o addopts='' -p no:xdist). Landing page has data-testids: brand-logo, nav-home/about/services/contact, nav-login-btn, nav-register-btn, hero-register-btn, hero-login-btn, cta-register, cta-contact, mobile-menu-btn — all present and functional. Sidebar label for jobs page is 'Job Openings' (not 'Jobs'). Contact form emits toast selector [role='status'] with success text. Zero console errors on landing/public pages; nested-<a> hydration warning limited to /app layout (LOW priority).
